title: Home | Your Product
description: A platform-site starter homepage focused on product explanation, use cases, and trust.
heroTitle: Explain the product before anything else
heroText: Use this homepage to say what the product is, who it is for, and why the platform matters before visitors disappear into navigation or marketing copy.

cards.title: Core workflows
cards.text: Use short cards to explain the main workflows or jobs the product supports.

cards.title: Use cases and roles
cards.text: Show which teams or user types get the most value from the platform.

cards.title: Trust and adoption
cards.text: Use this space for product reliability, implementation confidence, or support signals.
